title: Flea Treatment in South Bronx | Best Pest Control NYC | $350 - $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in South Bronx, Bronx. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call now for $350 - $650.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout South Bronx, protecting families and pets from painful flea infestations. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of flea control in South Bronx's diverse housing, from historic walk-ups to modern residential buildings. We offer fast, effective solutions with pricing from $350 to $650 depending on the size and severity of your infestation.
whyUs: Our team has over 15 years of experience serving South Bronx residents with safe, family-friendly flea treatments that eliminate fleas at all life stages. We offer same-day emergency service, use EPA-approved products safe for children and pets, and back our work with a 30-day guarantee to ensure your home stays flea-free.
localContext: South Bronx neighborhoods like Mott Haven, Melrose, and Port Morris feature a mix of pre-war apartment buildings, NYCHA developments, and newer construction—all of which can experience flea problems, especially in multi-unit dwellings where pets are common. Our technicians are familiar with local building layouts and work efficiently in everything from brownstones near Yankee Stadium to residential complexes along the Harlem River waterfront.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in South Bronx range from $350 to $650 depending on the size of your home or apartment and the extent of the infestation. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide flea treatment in South Bronx?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout South Bronx neighborhoods. Our team understands that flea infestations require urgent attention, especially when children and pets are being bitten, so we prioritize rapid response times.

faqs.question: Are flea treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved flea treatment products that are highly effective against fleas but safe for your family and pets when applied correctly. We provide clear instructions on any brief precautions needed during treatment and will work around your schedule to minimize disruption.

faqs.question: Do I need multiple treatments to get rid of fleas completely?
faqs.answer: Most flea infestations in South Bronx require 2-3 treatments spaced 2-3 weeks apart to eliminate fleas at all life stages (eggs, larvae, pupae, and adults). We include follow-up inspections and provide prevention tips to help keep fleas from returning to your home.
